if(!jdPanel) return; var btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.className = 'jd-export-btn'; btn.title = 'Exportar conversaci脙鲁n'; btn.innerHTML = '⇩'; btn.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:12px;right:48px;background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(200,0,0,.3);color:rgba(200,0,0,.6);font-size:14px;width:26px;height:26px;cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:999;'; btn.onclick = function(){ window.eosExportConversation(); }; jdPanel.style.position = 'relative'; jdPanel.appendChild(btn); }catch(e){} }, 3500); } // end N149 // 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙 // N150 脗路 SMART DEADLINE MANAGER // Proactively tracks task deadlines, warns about overdue / upcoming tasks, // and suggests sub-tasks when a deadline is near // 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙 if(!window.__n150Patched){ window.__n150Patched = true; function _lsGet150(k){ try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(k)||'[]'); }catch(e){ return []; } } function _n150DeadlineScan(){ var tareas = _lsGet150('eos_tareas'); var today = new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0); var overdue = [], today_due = [], soon = []; tareas.filter(function(t){ return !t.done && t.deadline; }).forEach(function(t){ var d = new Date(t.deadline); d.setHours(0,0,0,0); var diff = Math.round((d - today) / 86400000); if(diff < 0) overdue.push({task:t, diff:diff}); else if(diff === 0) today_due.push({task:t, diff:0}); else if(diff <= 3) soon.push({task:t, diff:diff}); }); return { overdue:overdue, today_due:today_due, soon:soon }; } window.eosDeadlineScan = _n150DeadlineScan; function _n150BuildAlert(scan){ var lines = []; if(scan.overdue.length){ lines.push('芒職聽茂赂聫 '+scan.overdue.length+' tarea'+(scan.overdue.length>1?'s':'')+' vencida'+(scan.overdue.length>1?'s':'')+':'); scan.overdue.slice(0,3).forEach(function(o){ lines.push(' 脗路 '+(o.task.title||o.task.text||'')+ ' ('+Math.abs(o.diff)+'d atr脙隆s)'); }); } if(scan.today_due.length){ lines.push('冒聼聰麓 Vence hoy:'); scan.today_due.forEach(function(o){ lines.push(' 脗路 '+(o.task.title||o.task.text||'')); }); } if(scan.soon.length){ lines.push('冒聼聼隆 Pr脙鲁ximas (芒聣陇3d):'); scan.soon.slice(0,3).forEach(function(o){ lines.push(' 脗路 '+(o.task.title||o.task.text||'') + ' (en '+o.diff+'d)'); }); } return lines.join('\n'); } // Patch n88LocalQuery for deadline queries var _orig150 = window.n88LocalQuery; window.n88LocalQuery = function(q){ var DL_RE = /\b(deadline|vencimiento|vence[n]?|plazo|fechas?\s+(l脙颅mite|limite|tarea)|tareas?\s+(vencida|pr脙鲁xima|urgente))\b/i; if(DL_RE.test(q)){ try{ var scan = _n150DeadlineScan(); var total = scan.overdue.length + scan.today_due.length + scan.soon.length; if(total === 0) return 'No tienes tareas con fechas l脙颅mite pr脙鲁ximas. 脗隆Todo en orden! 芒聹聟'; return _n150BuildAlert(scan); }catch(e){ return null; } } if(typeof _orig150==='function') return _orig150(q); return null; }; // Proactive deadline warning 芒聙聰 runs 90s after load, then every 30 minutes function _n150ProactiveCheck(){ try{ var scan = _n150DeadlineScan(); if(scan.overdue.length === 0 && scan.today_due.length === 0) return; var msg = ''; if(scan.today_due.length){ var t = scan.today_due[0].task; msg = 'Alerta: tienes una tarea que vence hoy 芒聙聰 ' + (t.title||t.text||'sin t脙颅tulo') + '. 脗驴La trabajamos ahora?'; } else if(scan.overdue.length){ var suf = scan.overdue.length > 1 ? 's' : ''; msg = scan.overdue.length + ' tarea' + suf + ' vencida' + suf + '. 脗驴Las revisamos?'; } if(!msg) return; // Only speak once per session per batch var sessionKey = 'eos_n150_last_warn'; var lastWarn = localStorage.getItem(sessionKey); var today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); if(lastWarn === today) return; localStorage.setItem(sessionKey, today); setTimeout(function(){ try{ if(typeof JD !== 'undefined' && JD.busy) return; if(typeof jdSpeak==='function'){ jdSpeak(msg); return; } if(typeof eosSpeak==='function'){ eosSpeak(msg); } }catch(e){} }, 800); }catch(e){} } setTimeout(function(){ try{ _n150ProactiveCheck(); }catch(e){}}, 90000); setInterval(function(){ try{ _n150ProactiveCheck(); }catch(e){}}, 30*60*1000); // Register tool try{ if(window.EOS_TOOLS && Array.isArray(window.EOS_TOOLS)){ window.EOS_TOOLS.push({ name: 'deadline_scan', description: 'Scans all tasks with deadlines and returns overdue, due today, and upcoming (within 3 days) tasks', input_schema: { type:'object', properties:{}, required:[] } }); } }catch(e){} var _origExec150 = window.eosExecuteTool; window.eosExecuteTool = function(name, inp){ if(name === 'deadline_scan'){ try{ var scan = _n150DeadlineScan(); var total = scan.overdue.length + scan.today_due.length + scan.soon.length; if(total === 0) return 'No hay tareas con deadlines pr脙鲁ximos.'; return _n150BuildAlert(scan); }catch(e){ return 'Error: '+e.message; } } if(typeof _origExec150==='function') return _origExec150(name, inp); return 'Tool not found: '+name; }; } // end N150 // 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙 // N151 脗路 EOS EMOTIONAL COMPASS // Detects emotional tone of messages, aligns responses with the 5 Orkis pillars, // and tracks emotional state over sessions // 芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙芒聰聙 if(!window.__n151Patched){ window.__n151Patched = true; // The 5 Orkis pillars + keyword maps var ORKIS = { 'amor': { label:'Amor no habitado', keywords:['amor','quiero','extra脙卤o','siento','coraz脙鲁n','duele','amo','enamorado','soledad','querer'] }, 'culpa': { label:'Culpa no reciprocada', keywords:['culpa','debi','perd脙鲁n','arrepiento','fall脙漏','mal','da脙卤o','lastim脙漏','error','perdiste'] }, 'cambio': { label:'Cambio', keywords:['cambio','evoluci脙鲁n','crecimiento','diferente','nuevo','transformar','mejorar','avanzar','crecer'] }, 'paz': { label:'Paz', keywords:['paz','calma','tranquilo','descanso','silencio','equilibrio','meditar','respirar','pausa'] }, 'inicio': { label:'Comienzo', keywords:['empezar','comenzar','inicio','principio','primera','nuevo proyecto','arrancar','abrir','nacer','lanzar'] } }; var EMOTION_TONE = { positivo: ['bien','genial','contento','feliz','emocionado','animado','listo','motivado','energ脙颅a','excelente','perfecto','incre脙颅ble'], negativo: ['mal','cansado','agotado','bloqueado','frustrado','triste','perdido','sin ganas','dif脙颅cil','no puedo','solo','vac脙颅o'], neutro: ['necesito','quiero','hacer','crear','avanzar','continuar','revisar','actualizar','buscar','analizar'] }; function _n151DetectOrkis(text){ var t = text.toLowerCase(); var scores = {}; Object.keys(ORKIS).forEach(function(key){ var kw = ORKIS[key].keywords; var sc = kw.reduce(function(s,w){ return s+(t.indexOf(w)!==-1?1:0); },0); if(sc > 0) scores[key] = sc; }); // Return top pillar or null var best = null, bestSc = 0; Object.keys(scores).forEach(function(k){ if(scores[k]>bestSc){ bestSc=scores[k]; best=k; }}); return best ? { pillar:best, label:ORKIS[best].label, score:bestSc } : null; } function _n151DetectTone(text){ var t = text.toLowerCase(); var pos = EMOTION_TONE.positivo.reduce(function(s,w){ return s+(t.indexOf(w)!==-1?1:0); },0); var neg = EMOTION_TONE.negativo.reduce(function(s,w){ return s+(t.indexOf(w)!==-1?1:0); },0); if(pos > neg) return 'positivo'; if(neg > pos) return 'negativo'; return 'neutro'; } function _n151SaveState(pillar, tone){ try{ var hist = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('eos_n151_emotional')||'[]'); hist.push({ ts: Date.now(), pillar:pillar, tone:tone }); if(hist.length > 100) hist = hist.slice(-100); localStorage.setItem('eos_n151_emotional', JSON.stringify(hist)); }catch(e){} } function _n151GetSummary(){ try{ var hist = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('eos_n151_emotional')||'[]'); if(!hist.length) return 'Sin datos emocionales a脙潞n.'; var last7 = hist.filter(function(h){ return Date.now()-h.ts < 7*86400000; }); var tones = {}; var pillars = {}; last7.forEach(function(h){ tones[h.tone] = (tones[h.tone]||0)+1; if(h.pillar) pillars[h.pillar] = (pillars[h.pillar]||0)+1; }); var topTone = Object.keys(tones).sort(function(a,b){ return tones[b]-tones[a]; })[0]||'neutro'; var topPillar = Object.keys(pillars).sort(function(a,b){ return pillars[b]-pillars[a]; })[0]; var lines = ['Br脙潞jula Emocional (脙潞ltimos 7d) 芒聙聰 '+last7.length+' sesiones']; lines.push('Tono dominante: '+topTone); if(topPillar) lines.push('Orki resonante: '+ORKIS[topPillar].label); return lines.join('\n'); }catch(e){ return 'Error leyendo br脙潞jula emocional.'; } } // Public API window.eosEmotionalCompass = { detect: function(text){ return { pillar:_n151DetectOrkis(text), tone:_n151DetectTone(text) }; }, save: function(p,t){ _n151SaveState(p,t); }, summary: _n151GetSummary, orkis: ORKIS }; // Patch jdBuildSystemPrompt to inject emotional context var _origSysPrompt151 = window.jdBuildSystemPrompt; window.jdBuildSystemPrompt = function(){ var base = (typeof _origSysPrompt151==='function') ? _origSysPrompt151() : ''; try{ var hist = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('eos_n151_emotional')||'[]'); var recent = hist.slice(-5); if(!recent.length) return base; var tones = recent.map(function(h){ return h.tone; }); var neg = tones.filter(function(t){ return t==='negativo'; }).length; var pillarEntry = recent.filter(function(h){ return h.pillar; }).slice(-1)[0]; var inject = '\n\n[N151 Emotional Context]'; inject += '\nTono reciente: '+(neg>=3?'negativo':'mixto/positivo'); if(pillarEntry) inject += '\nOrki resonante: '+ORKIS[pillarEntry.pillar].label; inject += '\nAdapta tu tono: si el artista parece cansado o bloqueado, s脙漏 m脙隆s emp脙隆tico y conciso. Si est脙隆 motivado, amplifica la energ脙颅a.'; return base + inject; }catch(e){ return base; } }; // Intercept n88LocalQuery to detect emotion + query var _orig151 = window.n88LocalQuery; window.n88LocalQuery = function(q){ var EMO_RE = /\b(br脙潞jula|estado\s+emocional|c脙鲁mo\s+me\s+siento|mis?\s+(emociones?|estado)|orki|orkis)\b/i; if(EMO_RE.test(q)){ try{ return _n151GetSummary(); }catch(e){ return null; } } if(typeof _orig151==='function') return _orig151(q); return null; }; // Patch jdQuery to auto-detect emotion before each call var _origJdQuery151 = window.jdQuery; window.jdQuery = function(userText){ try{ var tone = _n151DetectTone(userText); var orkiHit = _n151DetectOrkis(userText); var pillar = orkiHit ? orkiHit.pillar : null; _n151SaveState(pillar, tone); // Subtle visual hint when negative tone detected if(tone === 'negativo'){ try{ var orb = window.eosOrb; if(orb && orb.setBreathSpeed) orb.setBreathSpeed('slow'); }catch(e){} } }catch(e){} if(typeof _origJdQuery151==='function') return _origJdQuery151(userText); }; // Register emotional context tool try{ if(window.EOS_TOOLS && Array.isArray(window.EOS_TOOLS)){ window.EOS_TOOLS.push({ name: 'emotional_compass', description: 'Returns the emotional compass summary 芒聙聰 dominant tone and most resonant Orki pillar from recent sessions', input_schema: { type:'object', properties:{}, required:[] } }); } }catch(e){} var _origExec151 = window.eosExecuteTool; window.eosExecuteTool = function(name, inp){ if(name === 'emotional_compass'){ try{ return _n151GetSummary(); }catch(e){ return 'Error: '+e.message; } } if(typeof _origExec151==='function') return _origExec151(name, inp); return 'Tool not found: '+name; }; } // end N151 })();
